subcodes.first_line: Your letter hath reached Our presence, and We found it adorned with the mention of God, thy Lord and the Lord of all worlds, and We read it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی الوجه کتابک و وجدناه مزینا بذکر الله ربک و رب العالمین و قراناه
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heat and motion
